summary: Bridge entry gate duplicate slug protection verified and operational

implementation_details.mechanism: Local _bridge_consumed_slugs set maintains slugs consumed/rejected in current loop iteration
implementation_details.duplicate_detection: Intent slug is checked against _bridge_consumed_slugs before processing (line 534)
implementation_details.duplicate_action: Intent is rejected with reason='already_consumed_this_loop' and continues to next intent
implementation_details.set_population: Slug is added to set when: rejected by any gate, race condition detected, trade opens successfully
implementation_details.scope: Protection applies within single bridge loop iteration - resets on next loop

acceptance_criteria_check: ✓ Repeated intents for same slug cannot bypass gate protections in same bridge loop
✓ A slug rejected once cannot still open later in that same iteration
✓ No files outside allowed scope modified (only bot_core.py touched)
notes: This task was marked DONE by SONNET_WORKER. Verification confirms the duplicate slug protection is properly implemented throughout the bridge intent processing loop. The _bridge_consumed_slugs deduplication mechanism prevents repeated intents for the same slug from reopening after rejection in the same loop iteration.
